channel.title: FreelanceOS Blog — Notion Templates for Freelancers & Creators
channel.description: Guides, tips, and free templates for managing your freelance business and content workflow in Notion.

item.title: How to Manage Your Freelance Business in Notion (Free Template)
item.description: Learn how to set up a complete freelance business system in Notion — manage clients, projects, invoices, and revenue from one connected workspace. Free template included.

item.title: How to Organize Your Content Calendar in Notion (Free Template)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to building a content calendar in Notion that actually works — plan, draft, publish, and track performance across every platform from one dashboard. Free template included.

item.title: Best Notion Templates for Small Business Owners (2026 Guide)
item.description: The best Notion templates for small business owners in 2026 — for freelancers, content creators, e-commerce sellers, and agencies. Free and premium options compared.
